title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入阿尔巴尼亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入阿爾巴尼亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Albania CE-aligned electrical safety and EMC rules, DPS / ERE / OST market oversight, TS EN battery-standard expectations, fire-safety review, UN 38.3 transport requirements, and grid-connection requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与阿尔巴尼亚 CE 对齐电气安全和EMC规则、DPS / ERE / OST监管体系、TS EN 电池标准预期、消防安全审查、UN 38.3运输要求及并网要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與阿爾巴尼亞 CE 對齊電氣安全和 EMC 規則、DPS / ERE / OST 監管體系、TS EN 電池標準預期、消防安全審查、UN 38.3 運輸要求及併網要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, CE scope determination, ERE grid-connection decision, fire-safety determination, dangerous-goods classification, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, developers, project owners, insurers, and electric utilities should verify current Albania DPS, ERE, OST, customs, and project rules for each model, voltage point, route, and installation before shipment, sale, interconnection, or commissioning.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定、CE适用范围裁定、ERE并网裁定、消防安全裁定、危险货物分类或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、开发商、项目业主、保险方和电力公司在出货、销售、并网或投运前应核实每个型号、额定点位、线路和安装条件在阿尔巴尼亚DPS、ERE、OST、海关及项目规则下的实际要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定、CE適用範圍裁定、ERE併網裁定、消防安全裁定、危險貨物分類或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、開發商、項目業主、保險方和電力公司在出貨、銷售、併網或投運前應核實每個型號、額定點位、路線和安裝條件在阿爾巴尼亞DPS、ERE、OST、海關及項目規則下的實際要求。

answer_first.en: For China-made BESS exported to Albania, the practical baseline is CE-aligned product compliance where the equipment is in scope of low-voltage, EMC, radio, and safety-related regimes, with TS EN IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 evidence commonly used for battery and system safety. UN 38.3 is required for lithium-battery transport. Grid-connection and operational review is separate and handled by ERE and OST for project category and connection point.
answer_first.zh: 中国BESS出口阿尔巴尼亚时，实际基线是：设备落入低电压、EMC、无线电及相关电气安全制度范围时，需按 CE 对齐进行产品合规；TS EN IEC 62619和IEC 62933证据通常用于电池与系统安全；锂电运输仍需UN 38.3；并网和运营审查由ERE和OST按项目类别及接入点单独处理。
answer_first.zht: 中國BESS出口阿爾巴尼亞時，實際基線是：設備落入低電壓、EMC、無線電及相關電氣安全制度範圍時，需按 CE 對齊進行產品合規；TS EN IEC 62619和IEC 62933證據通常用於電池與系統安全；鋰電運輸仍需UN 38.3；併網和運營審查由ERE與OST按項目類別及接入點單獨處理。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, fire authority, grid operator, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
